validation_checks.reasoning: MITRE mappings validation: 23/25 technique-mitigation pairs are valid (92% accuracy). Invalid mappings: T1567→M1021 (LEAST PRIVILEGE), T1567→M1057 (VULNERABILITY SCANNING). Ground truth validation failed due to 12 generic technique issues. Risk score consistency good with 81.4% reduction matching valid mitigations.

coverage_metrics.reasoning: All 6 RAPIDS categories assessed (10/10). Technique-to-risk ratio appropriate with 11 unique techniques across 3 attack paths (8/10). High-risk categories (RANSOMWARE 70/100) have multiple controls including BACKUP, BEHAVIORAL ANALYSIS, CODE SIGNING (8/10).

internal_consistency.reasoning: Control rationales match inventory with all 17 controls properly categorized by criticality (8/10). Priorities aligned to risk scores with critical controls (LEAST PRIVILEGE, VULNERABILITY SCANNING, RATE LIMITING) addressing highest-risk techniques (8/10).

roadmap_validation.reasoning: Architect roadmap addresses real gaps including attack path redesign and control right-sizing (4/5). Improvement claims realistic with specific verification methods, though some point estimates may be optimistic (4/5).

gaps.description: LEAST PRIVILEGE claims T1567 ← mitigated by M1021, but M1021 not in T1567's MITRE mitigation list (only M1021, M1057 valid)
gaps.recommendation: Remove M1021 from T1567 mapping or replace with M1057 (Data Loss Prevention)

gaps.description: VULNERABILITY SCANNING claims T1213 ← mitigated by M1017, but M1017 not in T1213's MITRE mitigation list (valid: M1032, M1060, M1017, M1054, M1018, M1047, M1041)
gaps.recommendation: Verify M1017 mapping - actually valid per MITRE reference, no action needed

gaps.description: T1005 and T1567 have minimal mitigation coverage (1 control each) despite appearing in high-risk attack paths
gaps.recommendation: Add data loss prevention controls (M1057) and access controls (M1032) for better coverage

gaps.description: Ground truth validation shows 12 issues with generic techniques, affecting overall validation confidence (99.5% but marked INVALID)
gaps.recommendation: Review attack path construction to use more specific sub-techniques where available

strengths: Defense-in-depth strategy with controls implementing multiple mitigations (e.g., LEAST PRIVILEGE: M1016, M1018, M1026, M1042)
Critical techniques well-covered: T1059 (6 controls), T1190 (5 controls), T1213 (4 controls)
Risk reduction calculation realistic at 81.4% given extensive control coverage
Proper control prioritization with critical controls addressing highest-impact techniques

improvement_roadmap.action: Fix T1567 mitigation mapping for LEAST PRIVILEGE control
improvement_roadmap.impact: Improve MITRE mapping accuracy from 92% to 96%
improvement_roadmap.verification_method: Verify T1567 mitigations in MITRE ATT&CK reference (M1021, M1057 only)

improvement_roadmap.action: Add data loss prevention controls for T1005 and T1567 coverage
improvement_roadmap.impact: Improve technique coverage for data exfiltration attack paths
improvement_roadmap.verification_method: Implement M1057 (Data Loss Prevention) controls and verify coverage

improvement_roadmap.action: Refine attack paths to use specific sub-techniques instead of generic techniques
improvement_roadmap.impact: Improve ground truth validation from INVALID to VALID status
improvement_roadmap.verification_method: Replace generic techniques with specific sub-techniques and re-run validation
